title: Maintainer Guide
text: document covers repository operations maintainers HADES results model R package. consumer-facing usage model structure, see README.md.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Maintain versioned module definitions migrations. Build calendar-version ecosystem release manifests. Generate holistic DDL release manifests. Run validation tests CI checks. Optionally convert legacy CSV schema specs YAML modules.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: inst/modules/: versioned YAML module definitions inst/releases/: release manifests inst/schemas/hades_schema.json: module schema validation inst/schemas/release_manifest_schema.json: release manifest validation migration_engine.R: SQL generation DDL compilation migrate.R: migration orchestration version detection convert_csv.R: CSV--YAML conversion test_migration.R: migration validation zzz-internal-helpers.R: shared internal utilities build_latest_release.R: builds quarterly release manifests generate_release_ddl.R: generates combined release DDL convert_csvs_to_yaml.R: batch converts legacy CSVs YAML tests/testthat/test-model_validation.R: schema DuckDB execution tests

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Module definitions stored inst/modules/<ModuleName>/v<semver>/definition.yaml. Treat released versions immutable. module changes, create new semver folder module. Minor/micro updates may keep fields mark deprecated: true. Major updates must remove deprecated fields module definition. Current extraction target v1.0.0, deprecated legacy CSV fields dropped. Ensure every table field meaningful descriptions. cg_cohort_definition.cohort_definition_id database_meta_data.database_id Minor micro releases may retain deprecated fields mark deprecated: true. Major releases must remove deprecated fields YAML module definition. Module migrations written OHDSI SQL translated SqlRender validated executed.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Use migration script moving one module version next. Store migration alongside target version, example inst/modules/<ModuleName>/v1.2.0/migration.sql. Write migration OHDSI SQL can translated SqlRender. script transform prior version’s schema new version’s schema. CI test scans every module folder, requires migration script every non-initial version, executes rendered SQL DuckDB. Keep migrations additive explicit possible schema transition remains easy validate.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Run: Behavior: Computes current release version Sys.Date() quarter. Scans module directories inst/modules/. Selects highest semantic version per module via package_version(). Writes/overwrites inst/releases/release_vYYYY_QX.yaml. Internally calls buildLatestRelease() extras script.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Run: Behavior: Scans inst/releases/ release_vYYYY_QX.yaml files. Picks latest file year quarter. Loads module/version mapping manifest. Calls generateReleaseDdl() compile tables one SQL file. Writes/overwrites sql/hades_results_vYYYY_QX.sql.

what: Convert Legacy CSVs To YAML (Maintainer Script)
title: Maintainer Guide
text: Run: Behavior: Reads mapping/rules current_csvs/README.md. Calls convertCsvToYaml() package CSV file. Maps CSV filenames module names prefixes. Writes module YAML definitions inst/modules/<Module>/v1.0.0/definition.yaml.

title: Maintainer Guide
text: testthat yaml jsonvalidate jsonlite DBI duckdb SqlRender Install:

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Calendar release format: vYYYY_QX (example: v2026_Q3) Recommended sequence: Run Rscript -e "HadesResultsModel::buildLatestRelease()". Run Rscript -e "HadesResultsModel::generateReleaseDdl(sqlRoot='sql')".

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Release manifests validated inst/schemas/release_manifest_schema.json. Key constraints: release_version matches ^v[0-9]{4}_Q[1-4]$ release_date matches YYYY-MM-DD modules maps module names semver strings (example v1.10.0)

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Run tests locally: suite validates: module YAML files inst/schemas/hades_schema.json Latest release manifest inst/schemas/release_manifest_schema.json Module-level holistic release DDL execution -memory DuckDB

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Workflow file: .github/workflows/ci.yaml Trigger: every push pull requests targeting main Installs required R packages Runs full testthat suite

title: Maintainer Guide
text: Update module definitions (new semver folders needed). Run Rscript -e "HadesResultsModel::buildLatestRelease()". Run Rscript -e "HadesResultsModel::generateReleaseDdl(sqlRoot='sql')". Run Rscript -e "testthat::test_dir('tests/testthat', reporter='summary')". Open PR verify CI passes.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Schuemie M (2026). HadesResultsModel: HADES Results Model Definitions Utilities. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/OHDSI/HadesResultsModel, https://ohdsi.github.io/HadesResultsModel/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {HadesResultsModel: HADES Results Model Definitions and Utilities},   author = {Martijn Schuemie},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/OHDSI/HadesResultsModel},   url = {https://ohdsi.github.io/HadesResultsModel/}, }

title: HADES Results Model Definitions and Utilities
text: repository describes OHDSI HADES results model. tables populated various HADES packages, often part Strategus execution. repository also contains R package model resources utilities. ’ll find: Versioned YAML definitions tables fields (per HADES package) JSON Schemas YAML validation Release manifests HADES-wide versions human-readable overview latest released version repository follows standard R package structure. Model resources live inst/: inst/modules/: versioned module definitions (<ModuleName>/v<semver>/definition.yaml) inst/releases/: release manifests (release_vYYYY_QX.yaml) inst/schemas/: JSON Schemas used validation inst/sql/: generated holistic SQL output (working/output directory)

title: HADES Results Model Definitions and Utilities

what: Example: Migrating a results database to the latest version
title: HADES Results Model Definitions and Utilities
code: library(HadesResultsModel) connection <- DatabaseConnector::connect(dbms = "postgresql", ...)  # Detect current data model versions in your database versions <- inferCurrentVersions(connection)  # Migrate database to latest versions migrateResultsModel(connection, targetVersions = NULL)  # NULL = latest

what: Apply a migration SQL script to an active DBI connection — applyMigrationSql
title: Apply a migration SQL script to an active DBI connection — applyMigrationSql
text: Reads SQL migration file, renders SqlRender, executes existing DBI connection.

title: Apply a migration SQL script to an active DBI connection — applyMigrationSql
Apply a migration SQL script to an active DBI connection — applyMigrationSql
text: connection active DBI connection object. migrationFile Path SQL migration file. databaseSchema Schema name used rendering SQL SqlRender.

title: Apply a migration SQL script to an active DBI connection — applyMigrationSql

what: Build the latest quarterly release manifest — buildLatestRelease
title: Build the latest quarterly release manifest — buildLatestRelease
text: Builds release manifest selecting latest semantic version folder module writing result package releases directory.

title: Build the latest quarterly release manifest — buildLatestRelease
code: buildLatestRelease(   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   releasesRoot = resolvePackageDir("releases"),   releaseDate = Sys.Date() )

title: Build the latest quarterly release manifest — buildLatestRelease
text: modulesRoot Path modules root directory. releasesRoot Path releases output directory. releaseDate Date used derive release version (vYYYY_QN).

title: Build the latest quarterly release manifest — buildLatestRelease
text: full path generated release manifest YAML file.

what: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
title: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
text: Reads CSV file describing module's results data model writes definition.yaml compatible HADES module schema outputDir/moduleName/version/definition.yaml.

title: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
code: convertCsvToYaml(   csvFile,   outputDir,   moduleName,   prefix,   version = "v1.0.0",   addPrefix = NULL )

title: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
text: csvFile Path input CSV file. outputDir Root output directory. definition written outputDir/moduleName/version/definition.yaml. moduleName Name module (e.g.\ "CohortMethod"). prefix Table name prefix including trailing underscore (e.g.\ "cm_"). version Target module version string (default "v1.0.0"). addPrefix Whether prepend prefix table names already carry . NULL (default) auto-detects based table names found CSV.

title: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
text: Invisibly returns path written YAML file.

title: Convert a legacy CSV results data model specification to a YAML definition — convertCsvToYaml
text: CSV must contain least columns table name, column/field name, data type. Optional columns description, primary key flag, deprecation flag used present. Column names matched case-insensitively common variants (e.g.\ table_name, column_name, data_type, description, primary_key).

what: Find the latest release manifest file — findLatestReleaseManifest
title: Find the latest release manifest file — findLatestReleaseManifest
text: Selects newest release manifest releasesDir using year quarter ordering based file names like release_vYYYY_QN.yaml.

title: Find the latest release manifest file — findLatestReleaseManifest
Find the latest release manifest file — findLatestReleaseManifest
Find the latest release manifest file — findLatestReleaseManifest
text: Full path latest release manifest, NA_character_ none found.

what: Generate OHDSI SQL DDL for one or all HADES modules — generateModuleDdl
title: Generate OHDSI SQL DDL for one or all HADES modules — generateModuleDdl
text: Produces OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements specified module(s) chosen version, every module module NULL. SQL parameterized @database_schema can rendered SqlRender::render(sql, database_schema = "mySchema").

title: Generate OHDSI SQL DDL for one or all HADES modules — generateModuleDdl
code: generateModuleDdl(   module = NULL,   version = "latest",   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   databaseSchema = "@database_schema" )

title: Generate OHDSI SQL DDL for one or all HADES modules — generateModuleDdl
text: module Character vector module name(s) (e.g.\ "CohortMethod"), NULL (default) include modules found modulesRoot. version Version string "v1.0.0" "1.0.0", "latest" (default) select highest semantic version module. modulesRoot Path package modules directory. databaseSchema Schema parameter embed. Defaults "@database_schema" deferred rendering.

title: Generate OHDSI SQL DDL for one or all HADES modules — generateModuleDdl
text: character string OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements.

what: Generate release-level CREATE TABLE DDL from a release manifest — generateReleaseDdl
title: Generate release-level CREATE TABLE DDL from a release manifest — generateReleaseDdl
text: Builds OHDSI SQL DDL tables selected release manifest writes resulting SQL script disk. maintainer utility; use generateModuleDdl() programmatic DDL generation.

title: Generate release-level CREATE TABLE DDL from a release manifest — generateReleaseDdl
code: generateReleaseDdl(   releaseFile = NULL,   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   releasesRoot = resolvePackageDir("releases"),   sqlRoot = file.path(getwd(), "sql") )

title: Generate release-level CREATE TABLE DDL from a release manifest — generateReleaseDdl
text: releaseFile Optional path release manifest YAML file. NULL, latest manifest releasesRoot used. modulesRoot Path modules root directory. releasesRoot Path releases directory containing manifests. sqlRoot Output directory generated SQL files.

title: Generate release-level CREATE TABLE DDL from a release manifest — generateReleaseDdl

what: Resolve the ordered list of migration SQL files between two module versions. — getMigrationPath
title: Resolve the ordered list of migration SQL files between two module versions. — getMigrationPath
text: Traverses inst/modules/{module}/ build chain migration.sql files required advance currentVersion targetVersion. Returns empty list versions equal currentVersion "0.0.0".

title: Resolve the ordered list of migration SQL files between two module versions. — getMigrationPath
code: getMigrationPath(   module,   currentVersion,   targetVersion,   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules") )

title: Resolve the ordered list of migration SQL files between two module versions. — getMigrationPath
text: module Module name matching directory modulesRoot. currentVersion Installed version string without leading v (e.g. "0.1.0"). targetVersion Target version string without leading v (e.g. "1.0.0"). modulesRoot Path package modules directory.

title: Resolve the ordered list of migration SQL files between two module versions. — getMigrationPath
text: ordered list absolute paths migration.sql files.

what: Infer current module versions by fingerprinting an existing database schema. — inferCurrentVersions
title: Infer current module versions by fingerprinting an existing database schema. — inferCurrentVersions
text: Uses DatabaseConnector::getTableNames() list tables schema, issues SELECT TOP 1 * @database_schema.@table_name table obtain column names. compared YAML definitions inst/modules/ determine version module installed. module tables present, version reported "0.0.0".

title: Infer current module versions by fingerprinting an existing database schema. — inferCurrentVersions
Infer current module versions by fingerprinting an existing database schema. — inferCurrentVersions
text: connection active DatabaseConnector connection. databaseSchema Schema name inspect. modulesRoot Path package modules directory.

title: Infer current module versions by fingerprinting an existing database schema. — inferCurrentVersions
text: named list mapping module names detected version strings.

what: Migrate a HADES results database to a target calendar release. — migrateResultsModel
title: Migrate a HADES results database to a target calendar release. — migrateResultsModel
text: Opens connection using connectionDetails, detects creates central hades_result_version registry (using fingerprinting table absent), resolves SQL migration chain module needs upgrading, executes migrations. registry updated successful module migration. connection closed function exit.

title: Migrate a HADES results database to a target calendar release. — migrateResultsModel
code: migrateResultsModel(   connectionDetails,   databaseSchema = "main",   targetRelease = "latest",   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   releasesRoot = resolvePackageDir("releases") )

title: Migrate a HADES results database to a target calendar release. — migrateResultsModel
text: connectionDetails DatabaseConnector connection details object created DatabaseConnector::createConnectionDetails(). databaseSchema Schema name results database. targetRelease Calendar release label "v2026_Q3", "latest" select newest available manifest automatically. full path release manifest YAML file also accepted. modulesRoot Path package modules directory. releasesRoot Path package releases directory.

title: Migrate a HADES results database to a target calendar release. — migrateResultsModel
text: Invisibly returns named list final module versions recorded registry migration.

what: Print method for ValidationResult objects — print.ValidationResult
title: Print method for ValidationResult objects — print.ValidationResult
Print method for ValidationResult objects — print.ValidationResult
Print method for ValidationResult objects — print.ValidationResult

what: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
title: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
text: Creates -memory DuckDB database, builds starting schema fromVersion YAML definition, applies migration SQL, verifies resulting schema contains tables columns declared toDefinition. Throws informative error mismatch; returns invisible(TRUE) success.

title: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
code: testMigrationSql(   module,   migrationFile,   fromVersion = "latest",   toDefinition,   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   databaseSchema = "main" )

title: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
text: module Module name appears modulesRoot (e.g.\ "CohortGenerator"). migrationFile Path migration.sql file test. fromVersion Version string start (e.g.\ "v0.1.0") "latest" (default) use highest registered version. toDefinition expected post-migration schema. Accepts: version string "v1.0.0" (looked modulesRoot). path definition.yaml file (useful unregistered versions). parsed list returned yaml::read_yaml(). modulesRoot Path package modules directory. databaseSchema Schema name used rendering OHDSI SQL. Defaults "main" (DuckDB default schema).

title: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
text: Invisibly returns TRUE migration test passes.

title: Test that a migration SQL file correctly transforms a module schema — testMigrationSql
text: migration SQL must OHDSI SQL format (.e.\ parameterized @database_schema) can rendered SqlRender::render().

what: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
title: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
text: Queries existing database validates schema conforms expected structure defined HADES results model release manifest. Checks table existence, column names, data types, primary keys, column ordering.

title: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
code: validateDatabase(   connection,   databaseSchema,   targetRelease = "latest",   modulesRoot = resolvePackageDir("modules"),   releasesRoot = resolvePackageDir("releases"),   strict = FALSE )

title: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
text: connection active DatabaseConnector connection. databaseSchema Schema name validate. targetRelease Release label "v2026_Q3", "latest" select newest available manifest automatically. full path release manifest YAML file also accepted. modulesRoot Path package modules directory. releasesRoot Path package releases directory. strict FALSE (default), missing expected tables reported warnings. TRUE, missing tables errors overall result passed = FALSE.

title: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
text: list class "ValidationResult" components: passed Logical indicating overall validation success. errors Character vector error messages. warnings Character vector warning messages. moduleDetails Named list per-module validation details. releaseVersion release version string validated .

title: Validate a database schema against a HADES results model release — validateDatabase
text: default validates latest released version, users can override target specific version (e.g. "v2026_Q1") provide full path custom release manifest YAML file. Missing tables (example SelfControlledCohort tables, included example data) reported warnings default. Set strict = TRUE treat missing expected tables errors.

what: Convert a module YAML definition to OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements — yamlDefinitionToSql
title: Convert a module YAML definition to OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements — yamlDefinitionToSql
text: Reads HADES module definition (file path parsed list) produces OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements parameterized @database_schema. Render returned SQL SqlRender::render(sql, database_schema = "mySchema") execution.

title: Convert a module YAML definition to OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements — yamlDefinitionToSql
Convert a module YAML definition to OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements — yamlDefinitionToSql
text: definition Either path definition.yaml file list returned yaml::read_yaml(). databaseSchema Schema parameter embed. Defaults literal "@database_schema" deferred rendering via SqlRender::render(). additionalTables Character vector table names modules may appear foreign-key references. Defaults two standard cross-module tables.

title: Convert a module YAML definition to OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements — yamlDefinitionToSql
text: single character string OHDSI SQL CREATE TABLE statements.
